<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>刚刚好的我们</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{--gold:#e8c97d;--deep-navy:#050814;--text-soft:rgba(255,255,255,0.75)}
body{background:#020408;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;min-height:100vh;padding:20px;font-family:'Noto Sans SC',sans-serif}
.poster{width:480px;min-height:960px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#040610 0%,#080d20 20%,#0a1030 40%,#060915 60%,#030510 100%);border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 30px 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),0 0 0 1px rgba(232,201,125,0.1)}
.stars-layer{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
.nebula-1{position:absolute;width:400px;height:300px;top:-50px;left:-80px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(100,80,200,0.12) 0%,transparent 70%);z-index:1;filter:blur(40px)}
.nebula-2{position:absolute;width:350px;height:250px;top:80px;right:-60px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(60,100,200,0.1) 0%,transparent 70%);z-index:1;filter:blur(50px)}
.nebula-3{position:absolute;width:500px;height:400px;bottom:100px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(80,50,150,0.08) 0%,transparent 60%);z-index:1;filter:blur(60px)}
.milky-way{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:50%;background:linear-gradient(115deg,transparent 20%,rgba(180,160,255,0.03) 40%,rgba(200,180,255,0.06) 50%,rgba(180,160,255,0.03) 60%,transparent 80%);z-index:1;filter:blur(8px)}
.shooting-star{position:absolute;width:2px;height:2px;border-radius:50%;background:white;z-index:5;top:15%;left:20%;animation:shoot 5s ease-out infinite 2s}
.shooting-star::after{content:'';position:absolute;width:60px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to left,rgba(255,255,255,0.8),transparent);top:50%;right:2px;transform:translateY(-50%)}
@keyframes shoot{0%{transform:translate(0,0);opacity:1}100%{transform:translate(120px,60px);opacity:0}}
.photo-section{position:relative;z-index:10;padding-top:52px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
.photo-frame{width:174px;height:174px;border-radius:50%;position:relative;animation:float 6s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
.photo-frame::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-6px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,transparent 0%,var(--gold) 25%,transparent 30%,transparent 70%,var(--gold) 75%,transparent 80%,transparent 100%);animation:spin 8s linear infinite;z-index:-1}
@keyframes spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.photo-frame::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-20px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(232,201,125,0.15) 0%,transparent 70%);z-index:-2}
.photo-circle{width:174px;height:174px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(232,201,125,0.4);position:relative;z-index:2}
.photo-circle img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 15%}
.star-dot{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:white;animation:twinkle var(--dur,3s) ease-in-out infinite var(--delay,0s)}
@keyframes twinkle{0%,100%{opacity:var(--min-op,0.3);transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.5)}}
.song-info{margin-top:28px;text-align:center;padding:0 32px;position:relative;z-index:10}
.song-title{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--gold);text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(232,201,125,0.5),0 0 60px rgba(232,201,125,0.2);margin-bottom:8px}
.artist-name{font-family:'Noto Sans SC',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:5px;color:var(--text-soft);font-weight:300}
.divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:24px 40px;position:relative;z-index:10}
.divider-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,rgba(232,201,125,0.4),transparent)}
.divider-diamond{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--gold);transform:rotate(45deg);opacity:0.8}
.lyrics{position:relative;z-index:10;padding:0 38px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.lyric-block{margin-bottom:18px}
.lyric-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(232,201,125,0.45);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.lyric-lines{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}
.lyric-line{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text-soft);letter-spacing:1.5px}
.lyric-line.highlight{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);font-weight:400}
.lyric-line.gold{color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;text-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(232,201,125,0.5);font-size:14.5px;letter-spacing:2px}
.anniversary{position:relative;z-index:10;text-align:center;margin:18px 44px 0;padding:16px;border:1px solid rgba(232,201,125,0.15);border-radius:2px;background:rgba(232,201,125,0.03)}
.anniversary-text{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:4px;color:rgba(232,201,125,0.6);font-weight:300;line-height:2.2}
.anniversary-text strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;font-size:14px}
.bottom-deco{position:relative;z-index:10;text-align:center;padding:20px 0 36px}
.constellation-line{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;opacity:0.35}
.c-dot{width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold)}
.c-dot.big{width:5px;height:5px}
.c-line{width:20px;height:1px;background:rgba(232,201,125,0.6)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="poster">
  <div class="nebula-1"></div>
  <div class="nebula-2"></div>
  <div class="nebula-3"></div>
  <div class="milky-way"></div>
  <div class="shooting-star"></div>
  <canvas class="stars-layer" id="starCanvas"></canvas>

  <div class="photo-section">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <div class="star-dot" style="width:3px;height:3px;top:-28px;left:25px;--dur:2.5s;--delay:0.2s"></div>
      <div class="star-dot" style="width:2px;height:2px;top:-12px;right:15px;--dur:3.2s;--delay:1s"></div>
      <div class="star-dot" style="width:4px;height:4px;top:22px;right:-32px;--dur:2s;--delay:0.5s;--min-op:0.4"></div>
      <div class="star-dot" style="width:2px;height:2px;bottom:12px;left:-28px;--dur:3.5s;--delay:0.8s"></div>
      <div class="star-dot" style="width:3px;height:3px;bottom:-22px;right:35px;--dur:2.8s;--delay:1.5s"></div>
      <div class="photo-circle">
        <img id="couplePhoto" src="" alt="君爱铖 & 雨燕" />
      </div>
    </div>

```
<div class="song-info">
  <div class="song-title">刚刚好的我们</div>
  <div class="artist-name">雨 燕 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 君 爱 铖</div>
</div>
```

  </div>

  <div class="divider">
    <div class="divider-line"></div>
    <div class="divider-diamond"></div>
    <div class="divider-line"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="lyrics">
    <div class="lyric-block">
      <div class="lyric-tag">Verse</div>
      <div class="lyric-lines">
        <div class="lyric-line">你说话像辩论赛选手</div>
        <div class="lyric-line">我说话像情感电台主播</div>
        <div class="lyric-line">第一次吵架我哭了</div>
        <div class="lyric-line highlight">你递纸巾 表情还是很冷静</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lyric-block">
      <div class="lyric-tag">Pre-Chorus</div>
      <div class="lyric-lines">
        <div class="lyric-line">吵到最后安静下来</div>
        <div class="lyric-line highlight">你还是在那里</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lyric-block">
      <div class="lyric-tag">Chorus</div>
      <div class="lyric-lines">
        <div class="lyric-line gold">不管怎么闹</div>
        <div class="lyric-line gold">我都知道你会在</div>
        <div class="lyric-line">不是因为你说过什么</div>
        <div class="lyric-line highlight">是因为你每次都做到了</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lyric-block">
      <div class="lyric-tag">Bridge</div>
      <div class="lyric-lines">
        <div class="lyric-line">凌晨那条消息 不是道歉</div>
        <div class="lyric-line highlight">是你用你的方式告诉我</div>
        <div class="lyric-line gold">就是欺负你爱我——</div>
        <div class="lyric-line">我笑出来了 气也消了</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lyric-block">
      <div class="lyric-tag">Outro</div>
      <div class="lyric-lines">
        <div class="lyric-line">两年了 我们都不一样了</div>
        <div class="lyric-line highlight">镜子里的我们 刚刚好</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="anniversary">
    <div class="anniversary-text">
      相识 <strong>两周年</strong> 纪念<br>
      谢谢你每次都还是来了
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- QR Code -->

  <div style="position:relative;z-index:10;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin:0 0 8px;padding-bottom:4px">
    <div style="font-family:'Noto Sans SC',sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(232,201,125,0.5);margin-bottom:10px;text-transform:uppercase">Scan to Listen</div>
    <div style="background:white;padding:8px;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(232,201,125,0.2),0 0 0 1px rgba(232,201,125,0.15)">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100px;height:100px;display:block;image-rendering:pixelated" alt="Suno QR Code"/>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-top:8px">刚刚好的我们</div>
  </div>

  <div class="bottom-deco">
    <div class="constellation-line">
      <div class="c-dot big"></div>
      <div class="c-line"></div>
      <div class="c-dot"></div>
      <div class="c-line"></div>
      <div class="c-dot big"></div>
      <div class="c-line"></div>
      <div class="c-dot"></div>
      <div class="c-line"></div>
      <div class="c-dot big"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Set photo
const b64 = '';
document.getElementById('couplePhoto').src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + b64;

// Stars
const canvas = document.getElementById('starCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
const poster = document.querySelector('.poster');
function resize(){
  canvas.width=poster.offsetWidth;
  canvas.height=poster.offsetHeight;
  drawStars();
}
function drawStars(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  for(let i=0;i<220;i++){
    const x=Math.random()*canvas.width;
    const y=Math.random()*canvas.height*0.65;
    const r=Math.random()*1.4+0.2;
    const op=Math.random()*0.7+0.1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x,y,r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=Math.random()>0.85?`rgba(232,201,125,${op})`:`rgba(255,255,255,${op})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
  for(let i=0;i<12;i++){
    const x=Math.random()*canvas.width;
    const y=Math.random()*canvas.height*0.55;
    const r=Math.random()*2.5+1;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.9)';ctx.fill();
    const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(x,y,0,x,y,r*5);
    g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)');g.addColorStop(1,'transparent');
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,r*5,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fill();
  }
}
resize();
</script>

</body>
</html>
